opinion.h4: RISTUCCIA ET UX. v. ADAMS ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT No. 191. Decided October 13, 1969
opinion.p: 406 F.2d 1257, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
396 U.S. 1 HAGAN ET AL. v. REAGAN, GOVERNOR OF CALIFORNIA, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 279. Decided October 13, 1969
The judgment is affirmed. Williams v. Virginia State Board of Elections, 393 U.S. 320.
